---
title: "Weekly IDSR Reports"
subtitle: "Notifiable Medical Conditions Surveillance System — Weekly Integrated Disease Surveillance & Response"
sidebar: weekly-reports
listing:
  id: reports-listing
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  grid-columns: 3
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
These reports summarise conditions notified to the **NMC Surveillance System (NMCSS)** for each CDC epiweek. They cover Category 1 & 2 notifications flagged for WHO IDSR reporting, with confirmed trends, epitable, and all-notifications overview.
:::

::: {#reports-listing}
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="How to generate reports"}
**Last 4 weeks (default):**

```r
source("weekly-reports/run_all_weekly.R")
```

**Adjust number of weeks** — edit `N_WEEKS` at the top of `run_all_weekly.R` before running.

Then run `quarto render` or `source("dev/deploy.r")` to publish. A listing stub is created automatically in `weekly-reports/posts/` for each rendered week.
:::

---

## Report structure

Each weekly report covers:

| Section | Content |
|---|---|
| Introduction | Export date, epiweek dates |
| Category 1 at a glance | Suspected & confirmed counts, all Category 1 conditions |
| Confirmed Notifications — Epitable | Weekly confirmed counts per epiweek (with CI & baseline) |
| Confirmed Notifications — Trends | Epicurve with rolling average for selected conditions |
| All Notifications — Epitable | Weekly all-notification counts per epiweek |
| All Notifications — Trends | Trends including Fever-Rash composite |

: Report sections {#tbl-report-structure .striped .hover tbl-colwidths="[30,70]"}
